nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club
nodes.summary: Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括White-tailed tityra、Mountain elaenia、Plain antvireo等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北美洲
nodes.summary: 北美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联97种鸟类，包括紅嘴樹鴨、黑嘴天鹅、加拿大雁等97种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Chestnut-sided warbler
nodes.summary: Chestnut-sided warbler（Chestnut-sided warbler，学名 Setophaga pensylvanica），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。
locations: Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club

nodes.name: 薩斯喀徹溫省

nodes.name: 南美洲
nodes.summary: 南美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联190种鸟类，包括小美洲鸵、大美洲鸵、北山䳍等190种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The chestnut-sided warbler breeds in Eastern North America, from Saskatchewan to the Maritimes. Although an observation of a male in breeding plumage was recorded as far West as British Columbia. They are usually found south of the 50°N, with the north-west Georgia as the most southern extent of their breeding range. They overwinter in Central America to northern Colombia, with a confirmed sighting from as far south as Ecuador

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: While they mainly spend their non-breeding period in Central America, with the highest numbers in Costa Rica, the chestnut-sided warbler does winter in southern parts of Mexico and some north-western parts of South America. The chestnut-sided warbler has benefited from the clearing of mature forests in their breeding ranges
